Chest.name: Barbell Bench Press (Flat)
Chest.description: A key exercise for developing strength and muscle definition in the chest using barbell.
instructions: Set up with the barbell properly adjusted to your height.
Maintain a stable base and engage your core throughout the movement.
Perform the eccentric phase slowly to maximize tension on the chest.
Breathe out during the concentric (push/pull) phase.
Always prioritize correct form over heavy weight.

instructions: Set up with the bodyweight properly adjusted to your height.
Maintain a stable base and engage your core throughout the movement.
Perform the eccentric phase slowly to maximize tension on the abs.
Breathe out during the concentric (push/pull) phase.
Always prioritize correct form over heavy weight.
